data.title: NEW PRODUCT: Dual Hazardous Location Cabinet Cooler Systems Protect Large Electrical Enclosures in Classified Areas
data.description: In Cincinnati on July 1, 2026, EXAIR introduced its Dual Hazardous Location Cabinet Cooler® Systems designed to safeguard large electrical enclosures in hazardous settings. These systems are specifically created for classified areas such as Class I Div 1, covering Groups A, B, C. The coolers offer a robust and maintenance-free solution for protection.

data.title: GCG Advisory Partners Completes Its Multi-Platform Strategy, Now Offering Hybrid RIA Optionality with the Addition of BlueChip Financial Advisors
data.description: GCG Advisory Partners (GCG) has successfully formed a strategic alliance with Fidelity Institutional Wealth Services, marking their initial custodial association. This collaboration also signifies GCG's entrance into the wider Southern New England market. The development was disclosed in Charlotte, N.C., on July 1, 2026.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- RELEX Solutions/
data.description: In a recent update, RELEX Solutions announced on June 26, 2026, that MOM's Organic Market will be enhancing its fresh supply chain planning with their assistance. This collaboration aims to improve the efficiency of MOM's Organic Market's operations and enhance the overall supply chain process. The partnership signifies a significant step forward for both companies. The specific details of the changes made were not disclosed in the release.

data.title: DISCLOSURE  OF THE NUMBER OF SHARES FORMING THE CAPITAL  AND OF THE TOTAL NUMBER OF VOTING RIGHTS  AS OF 30 JUNE 2026
data.description: A French corporation operating as a public limited company (société anonyme) has a substantial share capital totaling €1,464,729,242.50. The company is headquartered at 1973, boulevard de la Défense in Nanterre, France, and is registered under the number 552 037 806 with the Nanterre Commercial and Companies Registry. More information is available on their website at www.vinci.com.

data.title: RevTech Partners: Healthcare Leaders with More Than 90 Years of Combined Experience Launch Revenue Intelligence Platform That Helps Organizations Find Revenue Others Miss
data.description: RevTech Partners, based in Franklin, Tenn., unveiled their new Revenue Intelligence Platform that integrates over 90 years of expertise in healthcare operations, revenue cycle management, finance, consulting, and technology with artificial intelligence. This platform aims to assist healthcare institutions in pinpointing revenue loss, enhancing operational efficiency, and enhancing financial decision-making processes. The founding team comprises executives with extensive backgrounds in leading dental practices, DSOs, MSOs, and ambulatory services.

data.title: Simplehuman Launches Limited-Edition Liquidsteel Smoothie at Erewhon
data.description: Simplehuman, a renowned home brand based in TORRANCE, California, revealed the introduction of the Liquid Steel Smoothie on July 1, 2026. This limited-edition beverage is exclusively available at Erewhon Market, recognized as a Certified B Corp and Organic Retailer. Simplehuman is acclaimed for its innovative products that enhance everyday life, while Erewhon Market continues to impress as a sustainable and organic retail destination. The Liquid Steel Smoothie is aimed at health-conscious consumers and is expected to be a popular choice among shoppers at Erewhon Market.
Bouygues will now report total shares and voting rights each month.
Michelin finalizes purchase of Tex Tech Industries, strengthening Polymer Composite Solutions division.

data.title: Technip Energies announces end of share buy-back program
data.description: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has successfully finished its share repurchase program, which was initially publicized in a press release on March 18, 2026.

data.title: SPIE acquires nimeg ag
data.description: On July 1st, 2026, SPIE, a leading European provider of multi-technical services in energy infrastructure and communications, revealed its acquisition of nimeg ag, a specialized engineering service firm catering to the life sciences sector. This acquisition bolsters SPIE's presence in the burgeoning pharmaceutical and biotechnology facilities market and enriches its industrial services portfolio in Switzerland.

data.title: Ubisoft Appoints Christoph Hartmann To Lead Creative House 2 And Its Growing Portfolio of Franchises
data.description: In 2026, Ubisoft Entertainment announced their exclusive rights, retaining all copyrights. The Ubisoft logo, a registered trademark in the United States and potentially other nations, signifies their brand identity.

data.title: Texas Instruments to webcast Q2 2026 earnings conference call
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) announced that it will be broadcasting its second quarter earnings conference call on July 22 at 3:30 p.m. Central time. The conference call will feature Haviv Ilan, the chairman, president, and CEO, along with Rafael Lizardi, the senior vice president. TI, traded on Nasdaq as TXN, invited individuals to tune in to the webcast for insights into the company's financial performance during the quarter.

data.title: Universal Music Group N.V. to Announce Financial Results for the Second Quarter and First Half Ended June 30, 2026
data.description: In Hilversum, The Netherlands, Universal Music Group N.V. (EURONEXT: UMG) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter and first half concluding on June 30, 2026. The report is scheduled to be released after the Euronext market closes on July 30, 2026. This update comes amid growing anticipation for the company's figures.

data.title: UPMC Children's Hospital Foundation Celebrates Historic Community Investment in Children's Health
data.description: On June 30, 2026, in Pittsburgh, the UPMC Children's Hospital Foundation declared the successful completion of its fundraising campaign, This Moment: Put a Child's Future First, exceeding its target of $200 million. This initiative stands as the hospital's largest campaign, showcasing the community's remarkable generosity.

data.title: Hotel and Gaming Trades Council Members Begin Picketing at Two Times Square Hotels
data.description: Hotel employees at Fairfield by Marriott New York Manhattan Times Square and Four Points by Sheraton Midtown - Times Square on West 40th Street have initiated a boycott over unfair labor practices. They started picketing outside the Times Square hotels on Monday evening. The workers joined the Hotel & Gaming Trades Council, AFL-CIO (HTC) in October 2022. Despite prolonged negotiations for their inaugural union contract, the workers have taken action against the hotels.

data.title: Analysis on a potential prenup between Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, assessing the union's legal aspects with expert opinions.
data.description: Legal professionals are speculating on the contents of a potential prenuptial agreement between a globally renowned pop star and a three-time Super Bowl champion. The agreement, which would likely outline the division of assets in case of divorce, is expected to involve significant sums of money and assets due to the high-profile careers and earnings of the individuals involved. Experts are discussing the possible clauses that could be included in the agreement to protect both parties' wealth and interests.
